message:
test(fj-conformance): add comprehensive oracle tests for Expm1 primitive

Adds 25 tests for e^x - 1 covering zero, positive/negative values,
numerical stability for small x, infinity handling, NaN propagation,
sign preservation, monotonicity, and log1p inverse relationship.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
